title: PHASE3: Transplant checkpoint features & reconcile RPL branches to unblock 0.59
description: Transplant BLE MTU, SLIP escape, KISS shutdown, bounds checking to C (lichen/subsys/lichen/transport/*, lichen/subsys/lichen/l2/*) and Python (python/src/lichen/interface/kiss/*, python/src/lichen/slip/*, python/src/lichen/ipv6/*). Add ICMPv6/UDP/LOADng/GPSR/RPL validation. Reconcile integration/rust-rpl-recovery and integration/rust-prefix-model into main. Run pytest and west tests. Close all related beads.
close_reason: Transplanted BLE MTU=247 bounds, SLIP escape recovery with frame discard on invalid seq, KISS shutdown without UAF to C transport/* + l2/* and Python kiss/framing.py slip/codec.py ipv6/* + validation funcs for ICMPv6/UDP/LOADng/GPSR/RPL. Reconciled integration/rust-rpl-recovery into integration/rust-prefix-model then to main via rebase+merge (no conflicts after prefix-first). pytest -q python/ && west build -b native_sim lichen/tests/* pass. All related 2auf.*.55 .40 .44 .59 closed. .59 fully unblocked.
